ocr_findings.description: Image shows a detailed diagram 'サーバの仮想化' with labeled components: three individual server boxes each labeled 'アプリ / OS / サーバ', an arrow labeled 'サーバの仮想化', and a combined server box labeled 'アプリ アプリ アプリ / OS OS OS / 仮想化ソフト / サーバ'. OCR breaks this into multiple '[img-N.jpeg]' placeholders with fragmented labels ('サーバ' repeated on separate lines) — the diagram's structural meaning (three physical servers virtualised into one) is not conveyed textually.
Chapter sidebar '第10章 コンピュータシステム' visible vertically in image is absent from OCR. Page number '357' present in image but absent in OCR.

reviewer_notes: Page covers Lesson 10-02 利用形態やシステム構成による分類, focusing on サーバの仮想化. The introductory paragraph and the body explanation text are well captured. The virtualisation diagram is fragmented into image placeholders with only partial label text, losing the visual explanation of the 3-to-1 server relationship — med severity. Body text alone is still sufficient to understand the concept.
